case_title: ADAN LUEVANO et al VS. JEAN-CLAUDE MUZAC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PATRICIA MUZAC ONLY. CO-PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM IN OPEN COURT PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MUZAC, JEAN-CLAUDE MUZAC, PATRICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LUEVANO, ADAN KIL, SANG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED JUL-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MUZAC, PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PATRICIA MUZAC ONLY. CO-PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM IN OPEN COURT PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LUEVANO, ADAN KIL, SANG AS TO DEFENDANT MUZAC, JEAN-CLAUDE MUZAC, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MUZAC, JEAN-CLAUDE MUZAC, PATRICIA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LUEVANO, ADAN KIL, SANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LUEVANO, ADAN KIL, SANG ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED AUG-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LUEVANO, ADAN
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JOHANNA COBBLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED JUL-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MUZAC, JEAN-CLAUDE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUEVANO, ADAN KIL, SANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MUZAC, JEAN-CLAUDE MUZAC, PATRICIA THE COURT DECLINES TO AWARD DAMAGES TO EITHER PARTY FOR ALLEDGED PROPERTY DAMAGES. ANY ISSUE BETWEEN THE PARTIES THAT MIGHT REQUIRE EQUITABLE ORDERS - ORDERS AGAINST HARASSMENT, TO COMPEL REPAIRS OR CONTRIBUTION, OR THE PROHIBITIVE ACTION BY EITHER PARTY - ARE BEYOND THE JURISDICTION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
